title: libpod: report cgroups deleted during Stat() call
body:
The cgroup.Stat() operation is not atomic, so it's possible that the cgroup is removed during the Stat() call.  Catch specific errors that can occur when the cgroup is missing and validate the existence of the cgroup path.
If the cgroup is not found, return a more specific error indicating that the container has been removed.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/23789
